currentRelease.label: First Playable Alpha
currentRelease.scope: Garage Bay opening through Job Shop arrival

milestones.exit: Garage campaign completes E2E and enters Job Shop

Concurrent VMC/lathe work, staff assignment, payroll, inspection, and Connected Plant move complete
Chapters 3 and 4 playable with connectivity, OEE, tooling, handoffs, cells, and automation
Chapters 5 and 6, ending, all facilities, 24 Easter eggs, and credits playable
All content locked; saves, balance, accessibility, performance, browsers, controllers, audio, and security validated
No blocker defects; migration, telemetry, recovery, privacy, deployment, rollback, and human asset review approved
